events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May, known for his iconic guitar riffs and astrophysics background, was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen track driven by his legendary guitar work?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born in Dartford, Kent, in 1943.

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: 83 years young and still bringing the moves! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV, Music Television, made its debut, forever changing the music landscape with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and played 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it? Or did it just change the game?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop history.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. An album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years since the iconic event
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in music history.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years since we lost the King of Rock & Roll. His music and legacy live on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who passed away on September 13, 1996, days after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: 30 years on, remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur on hip-hop and culture. His words still resonate.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after we lost a true guitar visionary. His influence is eternal.

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that unforgettable zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' is 57! That album cover, those tracks... pure timeless genius. What's your favourite from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the powerful voice and frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today, born in Akron, Ohio, in 1951.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and attitude continue to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and a formidable solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today, born in Manchester in 1972.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that swagger. What's your favourite tune featuring his vocals?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity feels as relevant as ever.

events.title: The original iPod was released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, the original iPod changed how we listened to music forever. Who remembers their first iPod?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, what's your favourite thing about 007?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Visionary musician and co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, John Cleese, was born on this day in 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.
